### 2. Webhook Admission Controllers (`pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/`)
- **`mutating/plugin.go`** — `Plugin.Admit()`: MutatingAdmissionWebhook entry point
- **`validating/plugin.go`** — `Plugin.Validate()`: ValidatingAdmissionWebhook entry point
- **`generic/webhook.go`** — `Webhook.Dispatch()` / `ShouldCallHook()`: shared base, iterates matched hooks and calls the dispatcher
- **`generic/interfaces.go`** — `Dispatcher`, `Source`, `WebhookInvocation` interfaces

### 3. Webhook Call Dispatch
- **`mutating/dispatcher.go`** — `mutatingDispatcher.Dispatch()` / `callAttrMutatingHook()`: calls each mutating webhook, applies JSON patches
- **`mutating/reinvocationcontext.go`** — `webhookReinvokeContext`: reinvocation tracking after mutation
- **`validating/dispatcher.go`** — `validatingDispatcher.Dispatch()` / `callHook()`: fans out to validating webhooks in parallel

### 4. Admission Response Aggregation
- **`request/admissionreview.go`** — `CreateAdmissionObjects()`, `VerifyAdmissionResponse()`, `CreateV1AdmissionReview()`: builds requests and parses responses
- **`errors/statuserror.go`** — `ToStatusErr()`: converts webhook rejections to API errors

### 5. Supporting Infrastructure
- Configuration managers (`configuration/mutating_webhook_manager.go`, `validating_webhook_manager.go`, `configuration_manager.go`)
- Webhook accessors (`accessors.go`)
- Predicates: namespace, object, rules matchers + CEL match conditions
- HTTP client layer (`pkg/util/webhook/`: `webhook.go`, `client.go`, `authentication.go`, `serviceresolver.go`, `error.go`)

`callAttrMutatingHook` — dispatches calls to individual mutating webhooks, applies JSON patches to the object, handles reinvocation logic.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/reinvocationcontext.go`: `webhookReinvokeContext` — tracks which webhooks need reinvocation after object mutation.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/dispatcher.go`: `validatingDispatcher` / `Dispatch` / `callHook` — fans out calls to validating webhooks in parallel and `NewValidatingWebhookConfigurationManager` — provides the live list of validating webhooks.\n\n## Webhook Accessors\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/accessors.go`: `WebhookAccessor` interface, `NewMutatingWebhookAccessor`, `NewValidatingWebhookAccessor` — uniform interface to access webhook configuration fields regardless of type.\n\n## Matching / Predicate Evaluation\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/predicates/namespace/matcher.go`: `Matcher` / `MatchNamespaceSelector` — namespace label selector matching.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/predicates/object/matcher.go`: `Matcher` / `MatchObjectSelector` — object label selector matching.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/predicates/rules/rules.go`: `Matcher` — API rule matching (group/version/resource/operation).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/matchconditions/matcher.go`: `matcher` / `Match` — CEL-based match conditions evaluation.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/matchconditions/interface.go`: `Matcher` interface.\n\n## HTTP Client / Transport Layer\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/webhook/webhook.go`: `GenericWebhook`, `WithExponentialBackoff` — HTTP call to webhook endpoint with retry logic.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/webhook/client.go`: `ClientManager`, `HookClient` — manages REST clients per webhook configuration.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/webhook/authentication.go`: `AuthenticationInfoResolver` — resolves kubeconfig credentials for webhook calls.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/webhook/serviceresolver.go`: `ServiceResolver` — resolves service-based webhook URLs.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/webhook/error.go`:
